---
title: "LipidMSdatoma"
author: "Maribel Alcoriza"
date: "2026-03-16"
output: html_document
params:
    polarity: "positive"
    minpeak_ms1: 5
    minpeak_ms2: 4
    drtminpeak_ms1: 5
    drtminpeak_ms2: 5
    recurs_ms1: 5
    recurs_ms2: 10
    sb: 3
    sn: 3
    minint_ms1: 1000
    minint_ms2: 500
    drtgroup: 15
    minsamplesfracgroup: 0.25
    dmzprecursor: 5
    dmzproducts: 10
    rttol: 6
    coelcutoff: 0.7
    input_files: "test.mZXML"
    metadata: "metadata.csv"
    
---


```{r}
library(LipidMS)

files <- data.frame(sample = basename(params$input_files), path = params$input_files)
metadata <- read.csv(params$metadata)
metadata <- merge(metadata, files, by = "sample")
  
ncores <- min(length(params$input_files), parallel::detectCores())

if (nrow(metadata) != nrow(files)){
  stop("Mismatch between files and metadata samples")
  #writeLines("Mismatch between files and metadata samples", con ="/app/Output/error.txt")
}
metadata$sample <- metadata$path #Once we checked all file names, use actual paths
msbatch <- batchdataProcessing(files = metadata$path,
                               metadata = metadata,
                               polarity = params$polarity,
                               dmzagglom = c(params$dmzprecursor*3, params$dmzproducts*3),
                               drtagglom = c(300,300),
                               drtclust = c(100,200),
                               minpeak = c(params$minpeak_ms1, params$minpeak_ms2),
                               drtgap = 5,
                               drtminpeak = c(params$drtminpeak_ms1, params$drtminpeak_ms2),
                               drtmaxpeak = 200,
                               recurs = c(params$recurs_ms1, params$recurs_ms2),
                               sb = params$sb,
                               sn = params$sn,
                               minint = c(params$minint_ms1, params$minint_ms2),
                               weight = c(2, 3),
                               dmzIso = params$dmzprecursor,
                               drtIso = params$rttol,
                               parallel = TRUE,
                               ncores = ncores)

###################
# Alignment
if (ncores > 6){
ncores2 <- 6
} else {
ncores2 <- ncores
}
msbatch <- alignmsbatch(msbatch, dmz = params$dmzprecursor, drt = params$drtgroup*2, span = 0.4, 
                        minsamplesfrac = 0.75, parallel = TRUE, ncores = ncores2, global_gb = Inf)

###################
# Grouping
msbatch <- groupmsbatch(msbatch, dmz = params$dmzprecursor, drtagglom = params$drtgroup*2,
                        drt = params$drtgroup, minsamplesfrac = params$minsamplesfracgroup, 
                        parallel = TRUE, ncores = ncores2, global_gb = Inf)


#####################
# Fill missing peaks
msbatch <- fillpeaksmsbatch(msbatch)

###################
# Lipid Annotation
msbatch <- annotatemsbatch(msbatch,
                           ppm_precursor = params$dmzprecursor,
                           ppm_products = params$dmzproducts,
                           rttol = params$rttol,
                           coelCutoff = params$coelcutoff,
                           lipidClassesPos = c("MG", "LPC", "LPE", "PC", "PCo", "PCp", "PE", "PEo", "PEp", "PG",
                                "PI", "Sph", "SphP", "Cer", "AcylCer", "CerP", "SM", "Carnitines", "CE", "DG", "TG"),
                           lipidClassesNeg = c("FA", "FAHFA", "LPC", "LPE", "LPG", "LPI", "LPS", "PC", "PCo", 
                                              "PCp", "PE", "PEo", "PEp", "PG", "PI", "PS", "Sph", "SphP", 
                                                "Cer", "CerP", "AcylCer", "SM", "CL", "BA"),
                           parallel = TRUE, ncores = ncores, global_gb = Inf)

for (m in 1:length(msbatch$msobjects)){
  if (msbatch$msobjects[[m]]$metaData$generalMetadata$acquisitionmode %in% c("DIA", "DDA")){
      msbatch$msobjects[[m]] <- plotLipids(msbatch$msobjects[[m]])
  }
}

peaklist <- msbatch$features
peaklistNoIso <- peaklist[peaklist$isotope %in% c("", "[M+0]"),]

writexl::write_xlsx(peaklistNoIso, path = "/app/Output/peaklist.xlsx")

###################
#  plots
cat("\nPlots")
pdf("/app/Output/RTdevplot.pdf")
rtdevplot(msbatch)
  rtdevplot(msbatch, colorbygroup = FALSE)
dev.off()
pdf("/app/Output/TIC.pdf", height = 7, width = 10)
plotticmsbatch(msbatch)
plotticmsbatch(msbatch, colorbygroup = FALSE)
dev.off()

for (s in 1:length(msbatch$msobjects)){
  if (msbatch$msobjects[[s]]$metaData$generalMetadata$acquisitionmode %in% c("DIA", "DDA")){
    if (msbatch$msobjects[[s]]$metaData$generalMetadata$acquisitionmode == "DIA"){
      height <- 7
    } else {
      height <- 9
    }
    pdf(file = paste0("/app/Output/", gsub(".mzXML", "_plots.pdf", msbatch$msobjects[[s]]$metaData$generalMetadata$file)), 
        width = 8, height = height)
    if (length(msbatch$msobjects[[s]]$annotation$plots) > 0){
      for (pl in 1:length(msbatch$msobjects[[s]]$annotation$plots)){
        print(msbatch$msobjects[[s]]$annotation$plots[[pl]])
      }
    }
    dev.off()
  }
}
```
